## Summary

- [ ] Describe the change
- [ ] Link related issues or discussions

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build or tooling

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
- [ ] Tests added or updated
